subcodes.first_line: O peoples of the world! The Ancient King, Who hath manifested Himself through the Most Great Name, doth give you glad-tidings. By My life, the Day is come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل العالم یبشرکم مالک القدم الذی اظهر نفسه بالاسم الاعظم لعمری قد اتی الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @proclamation to the people of the world
